llm: LLM enabled with model deepseek-reasoner from BASE_MODEL via OpenAI SDK.

candidate.name: pure_cublas_three_sgemm
candidate.strategy: Replace three separate ATen matmul and addition with three direct cuBLAS SGEMM calls: SGEMM1 W@X (opA=N,opB=N), SGEMM2 X@B (opA=N,opB=T) producing U shape [d,16] with ldc=d, SGEMM3 A@U (opA=N,opB=N) with beta=1 accumulating into Y. Eliminates explicit transpose of B and separate addition kernel.

Eliminates explicit transpose of B and separate addition kernel.

avoid: Do not hardcode d values; keep runtime selection.
Do not use handwritten rank-16 kernels unless cuBLAS path fails correctness.
Do not store B.T as a separate transposed tensor; use cuBLAS transposed flag.
Do not rely on result caching; the benchmark likely uses fresh tensors per iteration.
Do not use ATen's matmul if cuBLAS can be called directly for lower dispatch overhead.
evidence: Correctness perfect across all d values (max_abs_err=0, rel_l2_err=0).
Aggregate speedup 0.99979, essentially identical to torch reference.
Latency matches torch reference within 0.1%, indicating no improvement.
Profile summary identifies multiple separate ATen GEMM and addition launches as bottleneck.
Baseline uses separate ATen matmul calls for W@X, B.T@X, and A@(B.T@X) plus addition.
recommended_actions: Implement a pure cuBLAS three-SGEMM sequence: SGEMM1 for W@X (opA=N, opB=N), SGEMM2 for X@B (opA=N, opB=T) producing U of shape [d,16] with leading dimension d, and SGEMM3 for A@U with beta=1 accumulating into W@X output.
Ensure SGEMM2 uses m=d, n=16, k=d, and does not materialize B.T explicitly.
Ensure SGEMM3 uses m=d, n=d, k=16, beta=1, and consumes U as stored row-major with ldc=d.
Consider fusing the alpha/beta scaling into the cuBLAS calls to avoid extra scalar launches.

suggested_fixes: Consider using cuBLAS directly to avoid transpose and reduce memory overhead.
warnings: Candidate uses ATen matmul which may not be optimized; explicit transpose of B causes memory allocation and copy.

suggested_actions: fuse rank-16 update into the output tensor
test scalar and vectorized rank-16 kernels
